intro: Neuontobotrys polyphyllus, also known as Peganum harmala, is a plant species native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions, belonging to the Nitrariaceae family. The bioactive constituents of Peganum harmala seeds include harmine, harmaline, and tetrahydroharmine, which are responsible for its psychoactive and medicinal effects.
